prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为35933→38301→45403→41722→51128名，波动较大；2023年大幅后移至45403名，2024年回升至41722名，2025年再次大幅后移至5 1128名，创近5年新低，近2年累计后移约9406名；2025年基准位次约51128名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划2021–2022年均为21人，2023年缩减至18人，2024年 回升至19人，2025年扩至24人；2026年计划22人，较2025年减少2人（缩招约8.3%），缩招将导致竞争加剧，位次有望前移（更容易进）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 贵州大学为211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科排名持续上升至2026年第85名，综合实力和品牌认可度稳步增强，对考生吸引力有所提升；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，招聘 公告争议事件可能轻微影响报考意愿；抖音热度排名第76位，评价一般，无明显热度助推或降温信号；近年无投档线断档记录；植物保护为A-，为该校唯一A类 学科；招生专业中计算机类、人工智能、机械设计制造及其自动化、材料类、食品科学与工程类等均未在第五轮学科评估中获A类评级，优势学科与物理类招生专业关联度有限。\ n计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、信息安全）社会热度高热推荐，人工智能谨慎观望，电气类（能源与动力工程）高热推荐，机械设计制造及其自动化明 显劝退，材料类（属生化环材）明显劝退，药学未单独评级。广东省2026年物理类考生456000人，较2025年440208人增加15792人（+3.6%），竞争略有加剧；2025年物理类本科批 省控线436分，较2024年442分略降6分，难度基本稳定。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 贵州大学位于贵州省，距广东较远，属于跨省就读；该校在广东省物理类招生22人，规模适中，地域偏 好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基数效应、2026年缩招8.3%带来的竞争缓解、考生规模小幅增加及声誉偏负面等因素；结合考生增加和声誉因素微调后，预测最低位次约48672名，区间48172–49172名。

- 人工智能。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 35933 → 38301 → 45403 → 41722 → 51128, with significant fluctuations; in 2023, it dropped sharply to 45403, rebounded to 41722 in 2024, and again dropped sharply to 51128 in 2025, hitting a new low in the past five years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 9406 positions in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 51128; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong Province was 21 students in both 2021 and 2022, reduced to 18 in 2023, rebounded to 19 in 2024, and expanded to 24 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 22 students, a decrease of 2 students (about 8.3% reduction) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and likely cause rankings to move forward (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guizhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science ranking has continuously risen to 85th in 2026, with steadily increasing comprehensive strength and brand recognition, enhancing its appeal to candidates; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, and a controversial recruitment announcement incident may slightly affect application willingness; Douyin popularity ranks 76th, with average reviews and no clear signal of popularity boost or cooling; no recent records of admission line breaks; Plant Protection is rated A-, the only A-class discipline at the university; among the enrollment majors, Computer Class, Artificial Intelligence, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Materials Class, Food Science and Engineering Class, etc., have not received A-class ratings in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, and the connection between advantageous disciplines and Physics Category enrollment majors is limited. Computer Class (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security) is highly recommended due to social heat, Artificial Intelligence is cautiously observed, Electrical Class (Energy and Power Engineering) is highly recommended, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation is clearly discouraged, Materials Class (belonging to biology, chemistry, environment, materials) is clearly discouraged, and Pharmacy has no separate rating. In 2026, there are 456,000 Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province, an increase of 15,792 (3.6%) from 440,208 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch provincial control line is 436 points, slightly down 6 points from 442 in 2024, with difficulty basically stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Guizhou University is located in Guizhou Province, far from Guangdong, making it a cross-province study; the university enrolls 22 students in Physics Category in Guangdong Province, a moderate scale, and regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the competition relief from the 8.3% enrollment reduction in 2026, the slight increase in candidate numbers, and the somewhat negative reputation, after fine-tuning with candidate increase and reputation factors, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 48672, with a range of 48172–49172.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Computer Class (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security)
- Artificial Intelligence.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Food Science and Engineering Class (including Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, Brewing Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Class (including Materials Science and Engineering, Polymer Materials and Engineering)
- Pharmacy
- English.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (48172–49172), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main target, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. For rankings near the lower limit (around 48172), focus on sprinting for Computer Class or Artificial Intelligence; for middle rankings, consider Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Energy and Power Engineering; for rankings near the upper limit (around 49172), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors such as Materials Class, Pharmacy, English as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 7287 → 7447 → 8455 → 8477 → 8798, showing a gradual backward trend over the years, with a cumulative backward shift of approximately 1511 places in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 8798, a backward shift of 321 places compared to 2024, with the rate of backward shift accelerating; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong Province was 6 students from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 4 students in 2025, and remains at 4 students for 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no further expansion or reduction, making the impact of the plan factor neutral on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guizhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years: 135th in 2021 → 125th in 2022 → 109th in 2023 → 95th in 2024 → 86th in 2025 → 85th in 2026, with a steady improvement in ranking, enhancing the university's overall strength and recognition; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a controversy caused by inappropriate conditions set in a recruitment announcement, which the university has terminated and apologized for, potentially having a slight negative impact on some candidates' willingness to apply; its Douyin popularity ranking is 76th, rated as average, with no significant fluctuations in popularity; there have been no records of cutoff score breaks in recent years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection received an A-, the only A-level discipline at the university; among the enrollment majors, Chinese Language and Literature corresponds to Chinese Language and Literature (not separately rated), and Business Administration corresponds to Business Administration (not separately rated), with limited correlation between advantageous disciplines and enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of the Chinese Language and Literature major is recommended, with strong willingness to apply; the social popularity of Business Administration (including Accounting, Financial Management, etc.) is clearly discouraged, as the perception of a saturated job market may reduce application enthusiasm. In 2026, there are 326,200 History Category candidates in Guangdong Province, an increase of 34,000 (+11.6%) from 292,200 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition; the 2025 History Category undergraduate provincial control line is 464 points, a substantial increase of 36 points from 428 points in 2024, reflecting an overall increase in competition level; Guizhou University is located in Guiyang City, Guizhou Province, far from Guangdong Province, making it a cross-province study; the university has a small enrollment number for History Category in Guangdong (4 students), so the regional preference factor has limited impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant increase in History Category candidates in Guangdong Province in 2026 (+11.6%), the notable rise in the provincial control line reflecting intensified competition, and the slightly negative reputation of the university, it is expected that the ranking will continue to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 8798; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8848, with a range of 8348–9348.

Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Chinese Language and Literature.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Marketing, Accounting, Financial Management, Human Resource Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category only recruits 2 majors. If your ranking is within the predicted range (8348–9348), it is recommended to target Chinese Language and Literature as the main goal; if your ranking is near the lower limit of the range (around 8348), you can focus on sprinting for Chinese Language and Literature; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 9348), the probability of admission to Business Administration is higher.
